$comment: Copy these hook entries into .claude/settings.json to wire FLOW's deterministic gates. Paths are relative to the project root; adjust if your root differs. These run plain Node ESM scripts (no build step).

hooks.$comment: Budget gate: blocks a FLOW phase when its hard cap is exceeded.
Enforces Conventional Commits / one atomic commit per task.
Appends one metrics record per session to .flow/metrics/.
